start.welcome:
👋 Hello, *{name}*! Welcome to *ServerWatch*.

I monitor your server and answer questions about it using AI.

Use the buttons below or just type anything.

help.text:
ℹ️ *ServerWatch — Help*

*Commands*
/status — Current server metrics
/alerts — View and configure alert thresholds
/glances — Open live endpoint details menu
/models — Available model options (Ollama + optional cloud providers)
/context — Show chat context usage
/help — Show this message

*Context controls*
In free-text AI replies you can tap `ℹ️ Context` to open usage details, then use `🧹 Clear` or `❌ Close`.

*How it works*
Just type a question in natural language and I will gather live metrics and answer using your active model.

*Example questions*
• What process is using the most CPU?
• How much free disk space is left?
• Is the server doing OK right now?

status.finding_all_ok: All primary metrics are within expected range
status.action_warning: Review top process and watch trends for the next 5 minutes
status.action_critical: Mitigate the hottest resource now and verify service latency
status.unavailable: ❌ Could not retrieve metrics. Is Glances running?

glances.menu_hint: Pick one endpoint to fetch a live detail snapshot now.
glances.unavailable: ❌ Could not retrieve live detail for {label}. Is Glances running?

alerts.invalid_value: ❌ Invalid value. Please enter a number between 0 and 100.

models.local_empty: ℹ️ No local models are available.
models.cloud_empty: ℹ️ No cloud models are configured.
models.no_models: ℹ️ No models found on the Ollama instance.
models.no_models_available: ℹ️ No model options are available. Configure Ollama and/or cloud provider credentials.
models.unavailable: ❌ Could not reach Ollama. Is the service running?
models.ollama_unavailable_note: ⚠️ Ollama is currently unavailable. Only configured cloud options are shown.
models.install_prompt: ℹ️ Send the Ollama model name you want to install (example: llama3.2:3b).
models.install_cancel_unavailable: ℹ️ There is no active download to cancel.
models.delete_choose: ℹ️ Select the local model you want to delete.
models.delete_no_local_models: ℹ️ There are no local models to delete.
models.already_active: ℹ️ {model} is already the active model.
models.selection_expired: ⚠️ The model selection expired. Run /models again.

chat.error: ❌ Something went wrong while generating a response. Please try again.
chat.provider_error: ❌ Could not generate a response with {provider}. Check API/service availability and try again.
chat.cancel_unavailable: ℹ️ There is no active generation to cancel anymore.

errors.unauthorized: 👋 Hi! This is a private bot and is only available to its owner. If you think this is a mistake, please contact the administrator.
errors.general: ❌ An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.telegram_bad_request: ⚠️ Telegram rejected this message format. Please try again.
errors.service_unavailable: ⚠️ One or more services are unreachable. Check that Glances and Ollama are running.
